summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of ArtemCreations luxury e-commerce site after UX/UI redesign. All 14 features tested successfully. Site is entirely in French with modern, elegant luxury design.
passed_tests: Homepage hero carousel displays 5 product images with auto-rotation (5 second interval)
Hero carousel navigation works - prev/next arrows and 5 dot indicators functional
Navbar is transparent on homepage with white text
Navbar transitions to glassmorphism (bg-stone-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl) on scroll
Navbar works on non-homepage pages with dark text
Shop page loads with product grid and 7 category filter tabs
Product cards display 3:4 aspect ratio images with title and price
Product Detail page loads correctly with quantity controls and add to cart button
Cart page renders empty state with French CTA 'Parcourir la Collection'
Contact page form renders with all fields (name, email, subject, message)
About page renders with story section 'Notre Histoire' and values
Craftsmanship page renders with 4 process steps (01-04)
Footer renders with dark background, navigation links, and social icons
Mobile responsive menu toggle works with full navigation
All navigation links work correctly between pages
critical_code_review_comments: All pages properly use French language throughout
Design system is consistent: terracotta accent color, sharp-edged buttons, wide-tracked uppercase labels
Product images use 3:4 aspect ratio as specified
Navbar glassmorphism effect works correctly on scroll
All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: Products seeded via /api/seed endpoint on homepage load
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full UX/UI redesign testing completed. All core features working: hero carousel with 5 slides, shop filters, product detail, cart, contact form, about, craftsmanship pages. Site is entirely in French. Navbar has transparent/glassmorphism behavior. Mobile menu works. Footer has dark background with social icons.

design_verification.terracotta_color: Used for accents, CTAs, and highlights
design_verification.sharp_edged_buttons: No rounded corners on buttons (as specified)
design_verification.uppercase_labels: Wide-tracked uppercase text for labels and navigation
design_verification.transparent_navbar_homepage: bg-transparent on homepage, glassmorphism on scroll
